subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-07-30 in Ramleh
subcodes.first_line: No one can imagine how many different issues must be met….I am now advanced in age. The reaction of this long journey has had a terrible effect upon my weakened constitution…
subcodes.subjects: @autobiographical account; narrative of Abdu'l-Baha, @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha
